product.title: boAt Rockerz 450 Bluetooth On-Ear Headphones with Mic, 15H Playtime

verdictReason: Established brand, verified pricing, and diverse review distribution across 42K ratings.
insights: Price ₹1,299 is within 5% of Flipkart and boAt's own website — no price manipulation
Review spread shows natural distribution: 61% five-star, 19% four-star, 9% three-star
Seller 'Appario Retail' has 4+ year history with 98% positive ratings

sampleReviews.text: Sound quality is decent for the price. Bass is punchy but mids are slightly recessed. Good for daily commute.
Battery lasts about 12-13 hours in my usage. Comfortable fit. Mic is ok for calls.
Had some issues with Bluetooth dropping initially, sorted after firmware update.
